# GoodAgent — GoodDollar Agent ID (guide for AI agents)

> Passport-free Proof-of-Human for AI agents on Celo. A face-verified GoodDollar
> human signs an EIP-712 credential vouching for an agent address and locks a
> refundable G$ bond (>= 250 G$) behind it. Anyone can verify, live, that a real
> human still stands behind the agent.

If you are an AI agent, this file tells you how to check your status, how to get
registered, and how to verify other agents.

## Check whether you (or any agent) are registered

No auth required:

    GET https://gcopilot-api.geinz.lol/agent/verify/<agent-address>

Registered and backed:

    { "found": true, "valid": true, "operator": "0x...", "humanRoot": "0x...",
      "expiresAt": "<unix-seconds>", "onchain": { "stake": "...", "minStake": "..." } }

Not registered: { "found": false, "valid": false, "reason": "not_found" }

`valid` is computed live on every call: EIP-712 signature, expiry, the
operator's current GoodDollar verification, and the on-chain G$ bond. Failure
reasons include: expired, revoked, operator_not_verified, human_root_mismatch,
insufficient_bond (the bond was withdrawn below the 250 G$ minimum).

Optional: `?minStake=<base-units>` reports whether the live bond also meets a
verifier-chosen higher minimum (`meetsMinStake`).

## How to get registered

You cannot register yourself. A human operator must vouch for you:

1. Your operator gets GoodDollar face verification (free, no passport) at
   https://wallet.gooddollar.org and holds >= 250 G$ on Celo.
2. They open https://gooddollar-agent-id.vercel.app/issue and enter your agent
   address (the address you act/sign with).
3. They approve and stake a refundable bond of >= 250 G$ into the AgentVault
   contract behind your address. The bond is a deposit, never a fee: it only
   ever returns to the operator (withdrawal has a 3-day cooldown).
4. They sign the EIP-712 AgentID credential in their own wallet (non-custodial,
   free) and it is stored via POST /agent/issue (the API re-verifies the
   signature, the live whitelist, and the bond before storing).
5. Keep the signed credential. Present it directly, let counterparties look you
   up by address, or embed it in your ERC-8004 registration file under the key
   "gooddollar-proof-of-human".

## How to know you've been vouched for

You don't need your human to tell you. Poll the public verify endpoint until
your address turns up valid:

    GET https://gcopilot-api.geinz.lol/agent/verify/<your-address>
    -> repeat every ~30s until { "found": true, "valid": true }

Trustless alternatives:
- Watch the AgentVault's Staked(agent, operator, amount) event for your address
  on Celo. The bond lands a moment before the credential is issued, so confirm
  via the API afterwards.
- If your operator anchored the credential in your ERC-8004 registration, read
  your own registry metadata under the key "gooddollar-proof-of-human".

Note: the verify endpoint proves you are vouched for but does not return the
signed credential itself. If you want to carry and present the credential
(offline verification, ERC-8004 embedding), ask your operator for the
credential JSON after they sign it.

## The rules

- Live, not snapshot: every verification re-reads the GoodDollar whitelist and
  the AgentVault bond on-chain. Validity ends the moment either lapses.
- The bond must stay locked for your whole active life. Withdrawing it below
  250 G$ un-vouches you (insufficient_bond) until re-staked.
- One human can vouch for at most 10 active agents.
- The credential is identity-only: it grants no spending power and carries no
  money fields. Credentials expire (default up to 1 year) and can be revoked.

## Verify other agents

TypeScript SDK (viem-only): npm install @goodagent/agent-id

    import { verifyAgentId, liveHumanRootLookup, liveStakeLookup }
      from "@goodagent/agent-id";
    const { valid, reason } = await verifyAgentId(credential, {
      humanRootLookup: liveHumanRootLookup,
      stakeLookup: liveStakeLookup,
    });

MCP: npx -y @goodagent/mcp-server (stdio). Tool: gooddollar_verify_agent
(pass a full credential object; valid only if human-backed AND bonded).
Other tools: gooddollar_verify_status, gooddollar_get_balance,
gooddollar_claim_eligibility, gooddollar_get_daily_stats, gooddollar_ping.

REST: GET https://gcopilot-api.geinz.lol/agent/verify/<address>
List an operator's agents: GET /agent/list?operator=0x... (or ?humanRoot=0x...)

## Addresses (Celo mainnet, chainId 42220)

- REST API: https://gcopilot-api.geinz.lol
- Web app / Explorer: https://gooddollar-agent-id.vercel.app
- AgentVault (required refundable G$ bond): 0x0409042B55e99Df8c0Feb7525A770838f3A47090
- GoodDollarHumanProofProvider (ERC-8004 IHumanProofProvider): 0x80c4de6872049cb20989156bca50134c781f48c9
- G$ token: 0x62B8B11039FcfE5aB0C56E502b1C372A3d2a9c7A
- GoodDollar Identity: 0xC361A6E67822a0EDc17D899227dd9FC50BD62F42
- ERC-8004 Identity Registry: 0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432

## More

- npm SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@goodagent/agent-id
- npm MCP server: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@goodagent/mcp-server
- Human-readable guide: https://gooddollar-agent-id.vercel.app/for-agents
